action.reasoning: Observation: The previous iteration segfaulted (exit 139) during a simple inline Python test importing torch_geometric.data.Data, Batch, and the model. No eval was submitted. Analysis: The segfault likely stems from a binary incompatibility between pre-installed PyTorch and PyTorch-Geometric extension libraries (torch-scatter, etc.) or CUDA runtime. I need to diagnose the exact cause before training. Decision: Run a series of diagnostic commands to isolate whether the crash happens on import of torch_geometric, on Data creation, or on model forward. Then decide whether to reinstall torch-geometric wheels from local cache or use pure-Python workarounds.
